name: Brand new vacation house- Private gated community

reviews.reviewPositives: The place is very clean and new. The host is really nice. And everything in the house works perfectly. TV has many channels, and the bed is very comfy. The parking area is large and the house has a gate. Feel very safe. Highly recommend this place.

reviews.reviewTitle: I wish the owner provide better service
reviews.reviewPositives: It is near the beach, but the facilities including clean water are horrible. I did not take a shower for a day in this place due to no water. Sorry to say, the owner should manage the facilities and the person in charge to provide better service. I, as a customer, look for a comfortable place for vacation.
reviews.reviewNegatives: providing better facilities, and professional service, the price should be worth!

Hygiëne, was 1 kamer opgemaakt en maar voor 1 kamer beddengoed aanwezig, we checkten later in zoals aangegeven ivm boottijden. Maar we moesten meer dan een uur wachten voor we in de accommodatie konden.
